# Healthbazz Development

This is an e-commerce pharmacy application built with Next.js, designed to deliver medicines quickly and safely.

## Project Structure

- `/src/app` - Next.js App Router pages and layouts
- `/src/components` - Reusable React components
- `/public` - Static assets

## Color Scheme

- **Primary**: Emerald Green (#10B981) - Trust, health, growth
- **Secondary**: Dark Emerald (#059669) - Emphasis
- **Accent**: Amber/Gold (#F59E0B) - Highlights
- **Background**: Light Emerald (#ECFDF5) - Light backgrounds

## Getting Started

1. Install dependencies: `npm install`
2. Run dev server: `npm run dev`
3. Open http://localhost:3000

## Deployment

Currently configured for Vercel deployment.

## Git Workflow

All changes are pushed to: https://github.com/bazzcreate101-ship-it/healthbaz

Push after each feature completion for continuous integration.
